grant_title: Rhode Island Foundation offering $270,000 in grants to Newport County nonprofits
geographic_restrictions: Newport County, Rhode Island (Jamestown, Little Compton, Middletown, Newport, Portsmouth, Tiverton)
project_area: Develop new programs, strengthen or expand established programs, support municipal planning or leadership, address significant problems or opportunities, strategic partnerships, innovation, and measuring results
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations serving Newport County residents are eligible. The fund does not support individuals, scholarships, medical research, debt reduction, or fundraising, but may fund faith-based organizations for secular programs. Grants are awarded annually with no multi-year commitments.
